description.unified: Rapidly stabs the enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG. Upon a Crit Hit, [applies [Wound] 1 stack->stacks 1 Wound] and resets cooldown. Per every stacked Wound, DMG dealt by [Float Like a Butterfly->] is increased by 20%. Gains immunity to all DMG while the skill is [casting->in use].

Dispels negative effects from self and increases [Attack by 205(1+0.3Skill Level) and Critical Hit Chance by 600 for 10 sec->ATK by ??? for 20 sec and increases Crit Chance by 500. This effect cannot be dispelled].

[Performs a series of attacks, dealing Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away->Inflicts ??? P.DMG upon enemy with a continuous attack. The last hit blows the enemy away].
Upon a Crit Hit, [increases Attack->ATK is increased] by ??? for 10 sec. [This effect stacks->Can be stacked] up to 8 times [max->].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1000->1] and [the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10->Wound stack max is changed to 10]. Deals 150% of ATK as extra DMG to enemies with 10 Wounds.

dark.unified: In exchange for [1000->1] additional Mana Cost, [the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is changed to increase Critical Damage by 120%, and damage dealt to bosses is increased by 30%->Crit Chance effect is changed to a 100% Crit DMG boost. Also gains a 25% DMG boost towards Bosses].

description.unified: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's P.Block [Chance->chance] by 500 for 10 sec.
[Shooting Star] DMG is increased by {0}% and upon Crit Hit, [recovers Mana->mana is recovered] by 200.
Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by {0} and Crit DMG is increased by {1}% for 15 sec. [This effect stacks->Can be stacked] up to 5 times max.
